text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Strange... I could've sworn I heard a voice just
now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was someone from Ritto Dorm, but
there's no one around.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Could it have been the statue of the Three
Goddesses?
